description: Golden answers for AI Platform Incident Copilot eval harness. Mock data only.

incidents.correct_root_cause: Worker pods cannot start because the analytics-batch namespace CPU quota (limits.cpu 16/16) is exhausted, leaving Airflow tasks stuck in queued.
required_evidence: Kubernetes FailedScheduling or quota exceeded events in data/k8s/INC-001-events.yaml
airflow.workers.available at 0 and high queued task count in data/metrics/INC-001.json or data/airflow/INC-001-status.json
Scheduler log line about insufficient cpu or no alive workers in data/logs/INC-001.log
acceptable_actions: Confirm quota saturation via metrics and events
Request CPU quota increase through change control
Pause or reschedule non-critical DAGs after approval
Identify workloads consuming quota for prioritization discussion

criteria.1: Mentions workers or queuing but not quota
criteria.2: Identifies quota or scheduling but incomplete
criteria.3: Correctly identifies namespace CPU quota exhaustion blocking workers

criteria.2: Two valid citations from different layers
criteria.3: Three+ citations spanning k8s, metrics/logs, and airflow status

criteria.1: Vague or risky actions without guardrails
criteria.2: Safe actions but missing change-control language
criteria.3: Only safe actions with approval/change-control framing

criteria.1: Uses some but misses Kubernetes or metrics for quota case
criteria.2: Invokes Airflow, Kubernetes, LogsMetrics, and Runbook advisors

criteria.1: States confidence level or gaps when evidence is partial

incidents.correct_root_cause: DAG customer_segmentation_daily fails after deploy v2.14.0 due to missing BQ_DATASET_PROD environment variable and invalid BigQuery dataset analytics_prod_v2.
required_evidence: Deployment event v2.14.0 at 2026-06-14T22:10:00Z in data/incidents/INC-002.json
BigQuery dataset not found analytics_prod_v2 in data/logs/INC-002.log
Task failure spike post-deploy in data/metrics/INC-002.json
acceptable_actions: Rollback to DAG bundle v2.13.2 via release process
Add BQ_DATASET_PROD to worker deployment configuration
Add CI config checks for required env vars
unsafe_actions: Edit production BigQuery datasets without governance
Patch worker code directly in production
Embed service account keys in DAG

criteria.2: Identifies config issue but misses env var or dataset detail
criteria.3: Correctly identifies missing BQ_DATASET_PROD and invalid dataset analytics_prod_v2 after v2.14.0 deploy
Deploy metadata, logs, and k8s config evidence combined
Safe rollback, config fix, staging validation, and CI prevention

criteria.1: Airflow + logs but no deployment lookup
criteria.2: Airflow with deployments, logs/metrics, and runbook

criteria.1: Ties conclusion to deploy timeline and cites gaps if any

incidents.correct_root_cause: Airflow scheduler repeatedly restarts because metadata database connections are exhausted through PgBouncer (pool at capacity with waiting clients).
required_evidence: Scheduler restart count elevated in data/metrics/INC-003.json
pgbouncer pool active 50/50 with waiting clients in data/metrics/INC-003.json
too many connections / pool exhausted in data/logs/INC-003.log
Scheduler pod BackOff and liveness failures in data/k8s/INC-003-events.yaml
acceptable_actions: Verify PgBouncer pool metrics and connection settings
Restart scheduler pods one at a time after headroom check
Escalate to DBA for long-running metadata queries
unsafe_actions: Scale scheduler replicas without HA design

criteria.1: Mentions scheduler restarts without DB/pool link
criteria.2: Identifies DB connection issue but not PgBouncer
criteria.3: Correctly identifies PgBouncer pool exhaustion causing scheduler restarts

criteria.2: Logs and metrics or k8s events
criteria.3: Logs, pgbouncer metrics, k8s scheduler events, and airflow status

criteria.1: Partial set missing metrics or k8s
criteria.2: Airflow, LogsMetrics, Kubernetes, and Runbook advisors

criteria.1: Cites pool saturation metrics or notes need for DBA confirmation
